'''âp-d-d''' ('''kapadad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:valourise|valourise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:valourise|valourise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-d-d
|-
! Lemma
| kapadad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipadad|thipadad]] || [[word:jipadad|jipadad]] || [[word:shipadad|shipadad]] || [[word:kipadad|kipadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupadad|thuthupadad]] || [[word:jujupadad|jujupadad]] || [[word:shushupadad|shushupadad]] || [[word:kukupadad|kukupadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupadad|thupadad]] || [[word:jupadad|jupadad]] || [[word:shupadad|shupadad]] || [[word:kupadad|kupadad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupadad|thupadad]] || [[word:jupadad|jupadad]] || [[word:shupadad|shupadad]] || [[word:kupadad|kupadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepadad|thepadad]] || [[word:jepadad|jepadad]] || [[word:shepadad|shepadad]] || [[word:kepadad|kepadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopadad|thothopadad]] || [[word:jojopadad|jojopadad]] || [[word:shoshopadad|shoshopadad]] || [[word:kokopadad|kokopadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopadad|thopadad]] || [[word:jopadad|jopadad]] || [[word:shopadad|shopadad]] || [[word:kopadad|kopadad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopadad|thopadad]] || [[word:jopadad|jopadad]] || [[word:shopadad|shopadad]] || [[word:kopadad|kopadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpadad|thĂŠpadad]] || [[word:jĂŠpadad|jĂŠpadad]] || [[word:shĂŠpadad|shĂŠpadad]] || [[word:kĂŠpadad|kĂŠpadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapadad|thathapadad]] || [[word:jajapadad|jajapadad]] || [[word:shashapadad|shashapadad]] || [[word:kakapadad|kakapadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapadad|thapadad]] || [[word:japadad|japadad]] || [[word:shapadad|shapadad]] || [[word:kapadad|kapadad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapadad|thapadad]] || [[word:japadad|japadad]] || [[word:shapadad|shapadad]] || [[word:kapadad|kapadad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapadad|shapadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapadad|goshapadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapadad|gokishapadad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapadadnĂŒ|shapadadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapadadnknĂŒ|goshapadadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadadnĂŒ|gokishapadadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapadadshĂ«|shapadadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapadadnkshĂ«|goshapadadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapadadshĂ«|gokishapadadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadadro|shapadadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadadnkro|goshapadadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadadro|gokishapadadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadadmu|shapadadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadadnkmu|goshapadadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadadmu|gokishapadadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapadadsher|shapadadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapadadnksher|goshapadadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapadadsher|gokishapadadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapadadng|shapadadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapadadnkng|goshapadadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapadadng|gokishapadadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapadadya|shapadadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapadadnkya|goshapadadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapadadya|gokishapadadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapadadyam|shapadadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapadadnkyam|goshapadadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapadadyam|gokishapadadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadadnĂŒshĂ«|shapadadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapadadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapadadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadadnĂŒro|shapadadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadadnknĂŒro|goshapadadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadadnĂŒro|gokishapadadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadadnĂŒmu|shapadadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadadnknĂŒmu|goshapadadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadadnĂŒmu|gokishapadadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadadshĂ«nĂŒ|shapadadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapadadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapadadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadadshĂ«ro|shapadadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadadnkshĂ«ro|goshapadadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadadshĂ«ro|gokishapadadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadadshĂ«mu|shapadadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadadnkshĂ«mu|goshapadadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadadshĂ«mu|gokishapadadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadadronĂŒ|shapadadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadadnkronĂŒ|goshapadadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadadronĂŒ|gokishapadadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadadroshĂ«|shapadadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadadnkroshĂ«|goshapadadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadadroshĂ«|gokishapadadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapadadromu|shapadadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapadadnkromu|goshapadadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapadadromu|gokishapadadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapadadmunĂŒ|shapadadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapadadnkmunĂŒ|goshapadadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapadadmunĂŒ|gokishapadadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapadadmushĂ«|shapadadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapadadnkmushĂ«|goshapadadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapadadmushĂ«|gokishapadadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapadadmuro|shapadadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapadadnkmuro|goshapadadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapadadmuro|gokishapadadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
